sentences.arabic: قَدِمَ طَالِبٌ جَدِيدٌ إِلَى الفَصْلِ اليَوْمَ.
sentences.translation: Danas je u razred došao novi učenik.
sentences.translationEn: A new student came to the class today.

sentences.translation: Nastavnik ga je predstavio učenicima i rekao njegovo ime.
sentences.translationEn: The teacher introduced him to the students and said his name.

sentences.arabic: رَحَّبَ الطُّلَّابُ بِهِ بِابْتِسَامَاتٍ وَكَلِمَاتٍ طَيِّبَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Učenici su ga dočekali osmjesima i ljubaznim riječima.
sentences.translationEn: The students welcomed him with smiles and kind words.

sentences.arabic: جَلَسَ بِجَانِبِ زَيْدٍ وَبَدَأَ يَتَعَرَّفُ عَلَيْهِ.
sentences.translation: Sjeo je pored Zejda i počeo se upoznavati s njim.
sentences.translationEn: He sat next to Zaid and began getting to know him.
